claims.statement: Great Wall of China length is larger than Channel Tunnel length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Great Wall of China length: 21196 km. Channel Tunnel length: 50.45 km.

claims.statement: Peregrine falcon dive is slower than Elite sprinter top speed (approx.).
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Peregrine falcon dive: 390 km/h. Elite sprinter top speed (approx.): 45 km/h.

claims.statement: Appalachian Trail length is shorter than Seikan Tunnel length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Appalachian Trail length: 3500 km. Seikan Tunnel length: 53.85 km.

claims.statement: There are more strings on a violin than known chemical elements.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 4 strings vs 118 elements.

claims.statement: First powered flight happened after Barcode first scanned.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. First powered flight: 1903. Barcode first scanned: 1974.
